description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery is a solid, deep black fabric, giving it a contemporary and sophisticated appearance. Three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions provide ample comfort, while two decorative throw pillows with a contrasting light pattern add visual interest. The armrests are straight, boxy, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's geometric profile. The sofa stands on four slender, exposed legs, likely made of metal, which elevate the frame and enhance its urban, minimalist style. The overall design is functional yet stylish, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern black three-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and slender metal legs, accented by two patterned throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two decorative throw pillows, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned back panel and the exposed metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, with throw pillows visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with two smaller decorative throw pillows placed on one side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a flat profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, exposed legs positioned at the corners, likely metal with a simple, straight design and a dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest formed by three large, loose cushions, with no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushions themselves.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black fabric upholstery with a smooth, matte texture; throw pillows feature a contrasting light pattern.
